intake_form.user_inputs: How to clean up your fridge

context_pack.company_context: As no specific company or product is provided, this context pack will focus on general practices for cleaning a refrigerator. Typically, guides on this topic are provided by appliance manufacturers or home improvement brands.
context_pack.product_context: This context pack addresses the process of cleaning a refrigerator. The key considerations include removing expired items, cleaning shelves and drawers, and ensuring proper organization to maintain hygiene and efficiency.
context_pack.industry_context: There is a growing trend towards eco-friendly and non-toxic cleaning products in the home cleaning industry. Consumers are increasingly interested in methods that ensure safety and reduce environmental impact.

terminology_glossary.Defrost: The process of removing ice build-up in freezers or refrigerators to ensure efficient operation.
terminology_glossary.Deodorize: To remove or mask unpleasant odors, often using baking soda or specialized products.
terminology_glossary.Compressor: The part of the refrigerator that circulates refrigerant to keep the interior cool.
terminology_glossary.Shelf Life: The length of time food items can be stored before they spoil or become unsafe to eat.

typical_workflows.traditional_process: Traditional refrigerator cleaning involves unplugging the appliance, removing all items, cleaning shelves and drawers with soapy water, and wiping down surfaces. Optimized processes may incorporate time-saving tools like detachable shelves, vacuum attachments for tight spaces, and eco-friendly cleaning agents.

story_brief.video_goal: Guide viewers on effectively cleaning their refrigerator using professional methods
story_brief.target_audience: Individuals looking to improve home cleaning practices
story_brief.cta: Try these methods to keep your fridge clean and organized
story_brief.user_inputs: How to clean up your fridge
key_points: Remove expired items to maintain hygiene
Clean shelves and drawers with soapy water for thorough sanitation
Use eco-friendly products to ensure safety and environmental care
constraints: Do not claim: specific company or product details
story_brief.problem: Traditional refrigerator cleaning can be time-consuming and may not use eco-friendly methods.
core_interaction_steps: Remove all items and separate expired goods
Clean shelves and drawers with a soapy water solution
Wipe down all surfaces with an eco-friendly cleaner
Reorganize items to optimize space and maintain freshness
common_pitfalls: Not removing expired items can lead to odors and contamination
Using harsh chemicals can be harmful to health and the environment
